cells.rationale: Mechanical multi-file layering move with a well-specified acceptance and a named surface; the non-contiguous split risk warrants high but no intelligence-bound reason for opus.
Bounded hook-helper relocation following an existing dep-free pattern, verifiable by tests and lint; sonnet high fits, the fail-open constraint is well-specified not intelligence-bound.

Subtle correctness invariant: the boundary walker must model every real edge class or the claim is hollow, and the install reload gate's asymmetric failure directions must be exactly right on a contract-shaped fingerprint change.
Single-surface pure predicate plus scheduler filter threading that mirrors an existing precedent with pytest guards; mechanical work at the medium band.
